who: procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 vendor compliance documents/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 vendor compliance documents/month, manual tracking causes missed expirations and potential supplier penalties. We automate compliance verification instead of manual tracking of compliance documents and expirations.
problem: Ensuring vendor compliance and managing document expirations.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities asking for compliance tools
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about vendor management
DM outreach to procurement managers with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for procurement managers
try_it: Let users try expiration notifications and compliance checklists on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with the offer
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing documents
